name: Tributyrin mitochondrial-deficiency mouse lifespan study
summary: Mouse experiments testing microbiota transfer and tributyrin/butyrate supplementation in inducible TFAM-deficient mice with premature multimorbidity.
model_system: Inducible TFAM-deficient mice and mtDNA-mutator mouse context for mitochondrial dysfunction, dysbiosis, butyrate depletion, histone acylation, multimorbidity, and lifespan
